intro:
Finding the best dating app for college dating in 2026 requires a platform that verifies profiles, matches by compatibility, and doesn't charge you $30/month before you meet anyone. Free access at launch is critical for students. No subscription, no credit card required.

Embir checks all three: selfie verification, deep compatibility matching, and fully core connection features are free.
